content:
Hello. I decided to install the game on my PC and encountered the following problem:
Morimens launches, everything works fine, I've successfully logged into my account, but when I try to enter the game, it freezes.
In Task Manager, the game is marked as "Not Responding."
There are no errors in the event log.

How I tried to solve the problem:
Reinstalled the game
Installed from Steam (Exactly the same thing happens)
Updated Visual C++ and removed outdated versions
Updated Nvidia drivers
Updated Windows 10 to the latest version
Enabled and disabled VPN and third-party internet traffic programs

Note: The game works fine on my phone and laptop.
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Morimens freeze when I log in

content: Morimens freeze when I log in
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Morimens freeze when I log in

content: > We further optimized the story text display to enhance the reading experience. Multi-line story text now appears faster and remains on screen for sufficient reading time before scrolling up. Scrolling is now controlled manually and will not automatically happen (unless autoplay is turned on). Additionally, the text size was adjusted to display more content at once.

content: As you can see in the pictures I attached, Doll's Equivalent Exchange with E2 unlocked behaves differently in the Awakener details screen compared to in battle. Is the intent for this skill to only generate shield for each card discarded (that is, the card description in the Awakener details screen is wrong)? Or is this a bug?
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Doll's E2 Equivalent Exchange doesn't heal for every card discarded

content: I've attached the in-battle Equivalent Exchange behavior (before and after using the skill). Notice that it only heals 51 HP, going from 165 HP to 216 HP, even though it discards the entire hand. The shield is generated as expected.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Doll's E2 Equivalent Exchange doesn't heal for every card discarded

content: Never mind. The 51 HP is already the total HP restored (base heal + heal per discard). I didn't realize it already calculated the total
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Doll's E2 Equivalent Exchange doesn't heal for every card discarded

content: Still this is confusing given that the shield and the heal works the same way (each discard heals 5 and shields 5) but for some reason the heal per discard is calculated together with the base heal, while the base shield is not. It would be great if the card text can be consistent in both the Awakener details screen and the battle screen.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Doll's E2 Equivalent Exchange doesn't heal for every card discarded
